title: Implement smart tiered routing: Local → OpenRouter → Claude API

tasks.title: Add OpenRouterClient to hex-agent/src/inference_client.rs that uses OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var and calls api.openrouter.ai with model selection based on task complexity

Update inference routing to: T1 (scaffold/transform/script) → local qwen3:4b only, T2 (codegen) → local qwen2.5-coder:32b with validation → OpenRouter deepseek-coder on validation failure → Claude API as last resort, T2.5/T3 (inference/complex) → OpenRouter deepseek-v3 or Claude
Add metrics tracking to log which tier succeeded: local_success, openrouter_success, claude_success, all_failed so we can optimize routing over time
